extension.summary: Movies and shows in Indian languages
extension.description: This addon provides access to entertainment in various Indian languages such as Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam, Kannada, and Hindi[CR]Indian Movie Hub is and always will be free and open-source. None of its code and resources may be sold or redistributed for any commercial purposes.[CR]Indian Movie Hub and its developers [B]DO NOT[/B] host, create, or distribute any of the content displayed in the addon, it simply scrapes ad financed public websites.[CR]Based on Deccan Delight by gujal (GPL-3.0).
extension.disclaimer: Indian Movie Hub and its developers are not in any way affiliated with Kodi or any of the sites used in the addon.
